text.title: Acceptance Criteria Examples
text.summary: Login feature with three BDD scenarios, shopping cart as rule-based checklist, and the requirement-to-test-case hierarchy.

example.code:
Scenario 1: Successful login Given I am on the login page And I have a valid registered account When I enter my correct email and password And I click "Login" Then I am redirected to the dashboard And I see a welcome message containing my first name And my session is active for 30 minutes
Scenario 2: Invalid credentials Given I am on the login page When I enter an incorrect email or password And I click "Login" Then I see the error message "Invalid email or password" And I remain on the login page And the password field is cleared
Scenario 3: Account locked after repeated failures Given I have failed login 5 consecutive times When I attempt to log in again Then I see "Account locked. Try again in 30 minutes." And login attempts are rejected for 30 minutes for this account
Non-functional: - Login request must complete within 2 seconds (p95, production load) - Password must not appear in application logs or network responses

Functional criteria: - [ ] User can add a product to the cart from the product detail page - [ ] User can add a product to the cart from search results - [ ] Cart icon in the header shows current item count - [ ] Adding the same product increments quantity (no duplicate line items) - [ ] Maximum quantity per product per cart is 99 - [ ] User sees a confirmation notification when an item is added
Persistence criteria: - [ ] Cart persists for 30 days for logged-in users - [ ] Cart persists for the browser session duration for guest users
Validation criteria: - [ ] Out-of-stock products cannot be added to the cart - [ ] Quantity field accepts only positive integers between 1 and 99

example.note: Shows how one requirement expands to multiple AC which expand to multiple test cases.
example.code: REQ-045: Password Reset AC-1 (BDD): Successful reset via email link TC-1a: Valid reset link navigates to password entry form TC-1b: Valid new password updates credential and logs user in AC-2 (BDD): Expired reset link TC-2a: Expired link shows "Link expired" error TC-2b: User can request a new reset link after expiry AC-3 (checklist): Password rules TC-3a: Password under 8 characters is rejected TC-3b: Password without uppercase letter is rejected TC-3c: Password matching previous 3 passwords is rejected
